title: Garlicky Crumbly Irish Potato Casserole
description: A comforting, garlicky Irish dish perfect for a sick day, featuring mixed spice and bhuna for added flavor. This low-calorie-friendly casserole is a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine sliced potatoes and minced garlic.
In a small bowl, mix together mixed spice and bhuna spice blend.
Add the spice blend to the potatoes and toss to coat.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
In a greased 9x13 inch baking dish, create a layer of potatoes. Top with a layer of cooked onion and a sprinkle of shredded cheese.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Sprinkle whole wheat breadcrumbs over the top layer of cheese.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake for 45-50 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the potatoes are tender.
